---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for the Security Intelligence Platform
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: Ksander215
---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of what problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
- Which INT module would this affect? [e.g. INT-012 AI Layer]
- Is this related to an existing ADR? [e.g. ADR-011]

## Use Case
Describe a specific use case where this feature would be valuable.
